tweets.text: Personal update: I've joined Anthropic. I think the next few years at the frontier of LLMs will be especially formative. I am very excited to join the team here and get back to R&D.
AIE coming to India soon!
New Latent Space Essay: why Agent Labs are clearly emerging as a complement to Model Labs all becoming AI Cloud platforms.
three of the things we are most excited about: 1. AGI accelerating research 2. AGI accelerating companies 3. personal AGI accelerating everyone in achieving their goals
OpenAI offering $2M API credits to every YC startup in exchange for equity.
All Firewall mitigations are now fully free on Vercel.
Incidents at Vercel get automatically filed by anomaly detection systems. We just detected an outage 16 minutes before their status page changed.
CEOs are uniquely prone to AI psychosis because they're sufficiently distant from the last mile of work that still has to happen to generate most value with AI.
frontier smart, extremely efficient. Composer 2.5 is here.
For the next month, we're doubling Cursor usage for new users you invite on the Teams plan. Enjoy!
OK I guess we're going pretty fast improving GBrain day to day right now.
Full eval report and fixtures published and open source. Any memory system is welcome to run theirs against these evals.
Inside how Anthropic is building the next Claude: model and harness planning, Claude clustering user feedback into evals, training character and personality.
Proactivity is the next major leap for AI. It is extremely hard to manage agents if one can't do the job themselves.
We've automated every single thing we can with AI agents. And yet there's way more human work to do than ever. We've gone from 4 -> 30 human employees since GPT-3.
Today is my last day at OpenAI, as OpenAI for Science is being decentralized into other research teams. It's been a mind-expanding two years.
$1.3M OpenAI API bill for 100 Codex instances running OpenClaw. 603B tokens, 7.6M requests in 30 days.
Today we're releasing DeepSWE, a new standard for agentic coding benchmarks.
Can you imagine that we lived in a world 6 months ago when we would mostly just chat with LLMs and would be so happy about AI?? It's May 2026 now.
Three years from now, most pre-AI companies will be gone. Notion will be one of the few standing stronger than before.
A generation of PMs is struggling to adapt to AI because they were trained to execute playbooks. AI requires inventing them.
Replit tracking toward $1B ARR. Net revenue retention reaching 300%. We're going to try to stay independent.
Most people teach you how to build something big. But I think we should learn how to build something small. Follow Builders philosophy: follow builders, not influencers.
